texto: Perhaps all romance is like that
autor: not a contract between equal parties but an explosion of dreams and desires that can find no outlet in everyday life.
explicacao: Citação de not a contract between equal parties but an explosion of dreams and desires that can find no outlet in everyday life. sobre temas ligados a amor. “Perhaps all romance is like that” articula amor, jeanette-winterson, the-passion em registro de amor, com relevância para contextos como the-passion.
